name: England
style_of_play: Structured possession with emphasis on wide overloads, set pieces, and physical pressing.
weaknesses: can lack creativity against deep blocks
dependency on wide delivery at times
tactical_summary: Build in a 3-2-5 type shape in possession with wing-backs stretching the field; target striker links play and attacks the box on crosses and cutbacks. Compact 5-4-1 without the ball.
why_it_matters: England's set-piece routines and aerial presence can decide tight knockout matches even when open play is stifled.
injury_news: Placeholder — squad news to be updated via API integration later.
